summary: Phase C Sales Dashboard Testing - Iteration 203. Backend: 14/14 tests passed covering staff login, sales dashboard API with KPIs, pipeline, today_actions, recent_orders, assigned_customers. Frontend: All UI elements verified - KPI row (4 cards), Pipeline funnel (6 stages), Today's Actions, My Customers, Commission table with TZS amounts. Staff name 'Neema Mallya' correctly displayed (not generic 'Sales'). Sidebar Dashboard link correctly points to /staff. Marketplace cards regression passed (uniform 433px height).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase C Sales Dashboard is complete and verified. Key points: 1) Staff login via POST /api/admin/auth/login with sales credentials returns token with full_name in JWT. 2) GET /api/staff/sales-dashboard returns kpis (today_revenue, month_revenue, pipeline_value, total_earned, pending_payout, open_orders), pipeline (6 stages: new_leads, contacted, quoted, approved, paid, fulfilled), today_actions (array), recent_orders (with commission_amount, commission_status), assigned_customers (CRM). 3) Frontend SalesDashboardV2.jsx renders all sections with proper data-testid attributes. 4) Sidebar Dashboard link points to /staff (not /staff/home). 5) Marketplace cards maintain uniform height (433px). 6) Staff name 'Neema Mallya' correctly extracted from JWT full_name field.
